text.p: you can bet that now that i ve good access at home and in the office, my mails will be very regular.
Where did you borrow that turenchi from?
Anyway, i can vouch for your origin and a few more things about you.
Don't worry, we have no other country but this, so it must be reformed to taste.

hello sister.Thank God for your journey. Sorry we had problem with the internet thats why you have not received from me. I hope your husband is already in a camp.I also hope the children are ok. They should not have any problem since summer is just going. Greetings to your new friends. We had a Zonal rally in over the week end.
